name: @centraid/backup
description: Offsite storage engine: the centraid-storage-provider/1 wire protocol seam plus the centraid-snapshot/2 authenticated base-and-WAL format — fixed-size parts, entropy-gated zstd chunk compression, AES-256-GCM keyring/epochs, PITR, restore/verify, local and remote providers, and the provider conformance kit. Zero runtime dependencies — Node builtins only.
